criteria.name: Notebook loads real processed data
criteria.evidence: Cell 3 iterates data/processed/ subdirectories, reads station_hourly.csv for each station, prints row counts and date ranges. coverage_summary() called on real concatenated data. No stubs or synthetic data used.

criteria.name: EDA section with station coverage map/table, temporal coverage, missingness heatmap
criteria.evidence: Coverage table generated via coverage_summary() (Cell 5). Temporal coverage chart saved as notebooks/figures/temporal_coverage.png (Cell 7). Missingness heatmap for 6 key variables saved as notebooks/figures/missingness_heatmap.png (Cell 9). All three sub-components present and functional.

criteria.name: PCA section with scree plot, loadings table, biplot
criteria.evidence: PCA loadings table printed via pca_station_loadings() (Cell 12). Scree plot saved as notebooks/figures/pca_scree.png (Cell 13). PCA biplot with station scores saved as notebooks/figures/pca_biplot.png (Cell 14). All three sub-components present.

criteria.name: Clustering with dendrogram or cluster assignment table
criteria.evidence: Hierarchical clustering dendrogram saved as notebooks/figures/clustering_dendrogram.png (Cell 16). Cluster assignments printed via cluster_station_order() (Cell 17). Pairwise distance matrix printed via pairwise_station_correlation() (Cell 17). Intra/inter-cluster distances computable from the matrix.

criteria.name: Redundancy section answers which stations are redundant
criteria.evidence: benchmark_to_stanhope() called (Cell 19). build_station_recommendations() called with PCA loadings + cluster order (Cell 20). Conclusion explicitly identifies Stanley Bridge/Tracadie as not suitable for redundancy (missing sensors) and Cavendish/Greenwich/North Rustico as showing temperature correlation suggesting redundancy.

criteria.name: FWI time series for at least 2 stations
criteria.evidence: Cell 10 identifies stations with >100 FWI records. Cell 11 selects top 2 stations by FWI record count, plots all 6 FWI components (ffmc, dmc, dc, isi, bui, fwi) as daily means. Saves notebooks/figures/fwi_timeseries.png.

criteria.name: Uncertainty with confidence intervals
criteria.evidence: Cell 21 calls quantify_station_removal_risk(benchmark) from pea_met_network.uncertainty module. Prints risk probabilities with ci_lower and ci_upper columns. Bar chart with 95% confidence intervals saved as notebooks/figures/uncertainty_risk.png.

criteria.name: All cells execute top-to-bottom without errors
criteria.evidence: pytest tests/test_analysis_notebook.py passes all 15 tests. Notebook executes end-to-end via nbconvert with zero cell errors.

criteria.name: Conclusion cell with key findings and recommendations
criteria.evidence: Conclusion markdown cell contains 5 numbered key findings covering data coverage, quality, FWI, station redundancy, and recommendations. No placeholder text. Explicit actionable recommendations about sensor gaps and redundancy candidates.

summary: All 9 acceptance criteria pass. The notebook has been substantially populated since the last review. Ralph implemented EDA (coverage table, temporal coverage chart, missingness heatmap), PCA (scree plot, loadings, biplot), hierarchical clustering (dendrogram, cluster assignments, distance matrix), FWI time series for 2+ stations, redundancy analysis with Stanhope benchmarking, uncertainty quantification with KDE-based risk probabilities and confidence intervals, and a substantive conclusion with findings and recommendations. All 7 expected figures are generated in notebooks/figures/. Tests pass 15/15.
